message:
fix(share): extend symlink-safe database path validation to bundle, deploy, and finalize operations

Completes the symlink safety rollout by replacing resolve_share_sqlite_path
with require_real_share_sqlite_path in the remaining share crate entry
points, preventing symlinked SQLite files from being processed in
bundle packaging, deployment artifact validation, and export finalization.

- Replace resolve_share_sqlite_path -> require_real_share_sqlite_path
  in bundle.rs (attachments and viewer export), deploy.rs (chunk
  artifact checks), and finalize.rs (export DB path)
- Add 4 unix-only tests: bundle_attachments_rejects_symlinked_snapshot,
  export_viewer_data_rejects_symlinked_snapshot,
  finalize_export_db_rejects_symlinked_snapshot,
  sqlite_bundle_checks_reject_symlinked_database — all verify
  ShareError::Validation on symlinked paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
